title: Staff AI Engineer
company_focus: Delivery Intelligence Platform for food-tech brands
description:
About Loop:

Loop AI is a San Francisco-based tech company founded in
2022. We provide a Delivery Intelligence Platform for data-
driven digital food brands, helping them optimize operations
and make informed decisions. Loop is at the forefront of
innovation in the food-tech sector.

About the Role:

At Loop, we value a growth mindset, passion for startups,
product curiosity, and a hunger for continuous learning. We
believe that the collaborative spirit among our peers is the
lifeblood of our startup. As a Senior Backend Engineer, you
will play a crucial role in designing the ideal backend
system architecture, addressing customer pain points, and
contributing to the overall success of our platform.

Key Responsibilities:

- System Architecture:Develop an ideal backend system
  architecture to solve problems efficiently.Create
  strategic plans to achieve the long-term vision while
  delivering shorter-term solutions that provide immediate
  value to our customers.
- Customer Interaction:Engage with customers to understand
  their pain points. Collaborate on brainstorming sessions
  to devise innovative solutions that enhance the customer
  experience
- Critical Thinking: Apply critical thinking to problem-
  solving, starting from the ground up. Challenge existing
  solutions and propose novel approaches free from bias.

What We're Seeking:

- 8+ years of relevant professional full-time experience
  building backend systems for Senior roles.
- Proactive self-starter capable of independently solving
  problems.
- Write clean and maintainable code using Python, Django,
  PostGreSQL / any relevant backend stack
- Troubleshoot and debug issues in the backend system
- Optimize the performance of the backend services (GCP , DBT)
responsibilities: Develop ideal backend system architecture to solve problems efficiently and create strategic plans for long-term vision
Engage with customers to understand pain points and collaborate on innovative solutions
Apply critical thinking to problem-solving from the ground up and challenge existing solutions
Write clean and maintainable code using Python and Django backend stack
Troubleshoot and debug issues in the backend system
Optimize performance of backend services using GCP and dbt
use_cases: Delivery intelligence platform for data-driven digital food brands
Enable data-driven decision making for food brands
Enhance customer experience through innovative backend solutions
ai_classification_reasoning:
The job description describes a backend engineering role
with no mention of building, training, fine-tuning, or
deploying AI/ML models. The title mentions "AI Engineer" but
all responsibilities and requirements focus on backend
system architecture, Python/Django development, and database
optimization - this is general software engineering for an
AI company, not hands-on AI work.
